---
pagetitle: "Talks and media | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Featured webinar, conference presentations, and invited talks by Dr Mesfin Genie on health-preference research, behavioural economics, and decision-support tools."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell">
<p class="eyebrow">Talks and media</p>
<h1>Talks and media</h1>
<p>Selected talks and public engagement. Conference abstracts and presentations are listed on the <a href="/conferences/">conferences page</a>.</p>
</div></header>

<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow">

<h2>Featured webinar</h2>
<div class="video-embed">
  <div class="video-frame" id="webinar" data-embed="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HO2qXJp-BFs?rel=0">
    <button class="video-play" type="button" aria-label="Play the featured webinar (opens the YouTube player)">
      <span class="video-play-icon" aria-hidden="true">&#9658;</span>
      <span>Play webinar</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
<p>A recorded webinar featuring Dr Mesfin Genie. The player loads only when you choose to play it, using the privacy-enhanced YouTube domain. You can also <a href="https://youtu.be/HO2qXJp-BFs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">watch it directly on YouTube</a>.</p>
<p class="grant-note">The exact title, channel, publication date, and duration of this recording are being confirmed and will be added here and to the page's structured data once verified.</p>

</div></section>
```
